emails.body: FW: Confidential--PG&E's Going to Announce an Open Season on Redwood and Baja (intrastate capacity) end of this next week or early next week Thanks for the update! In the future, you will need to spell my name completely there are too many smiller's! I am planning a trip to San Fran to meet with PG&E (tentatively June 6) will make sure I stop by to meet you. Regards, Stephanie To: Miller, Stephanie
